title: First-Line Supervisors of Farming, Fishing, and Forestry Workers
description: Directly supervise and coordinate the activities of agricultural, forestry, aquacultural, and related workers.

tasks.text: Assign tasks such as feeding and treatment of animals, and cleaning and maintenance of animal quarters.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Record the numbers and types of fish or shellfish reared, harvested, released, sold, and shipped.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Monitor workers to ensure that safety regulations are followed, warning or disciplining those who violate safety regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Observe animals for signs of illness, injury, or unusual behavior, notifying veterinarians or managers as warranted.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Observe fish and beds or ponds to detect diseases, monitor fish growth, determine quality of fish, or determine completeness of harvesting.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Train workers in tree felling or bucking, operation of tractors or loading machines, yarding or loading techniques, or safety regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Treat animal illnesses or injuries, following experience or instructions of veterinarians.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train workers in spawning, rearing, cultivating, and harvesting methods, and in the use of equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Train workers in techniques such as planting, harvesting, weeding, or insect identification and in the use of safety measures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with managers to evaluate weather or soil conditions, to develop plans or procedures, or to discuss issues such as changes in fertilizers, herbicides, or cultivating techniques.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Communicate with forestry personnel regarding forest harvesting or forest management plans, procedures, or schedules.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect crops, fields, or plant stock to determine conditions and need for cultivating, spraying, weeding, or harvesting.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate dismantling, moving, and setting up equipment at new work sites.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate the selection and movement of logs from storage areas, according to transportation schedules or production requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Schedule work crews, equipment, or transportation for several different work locations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drive or operate farm machinery, such as trucks, tractors, or self-propelled harvesters, to transport workers or supplies or to cultivate or harvest fields.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform both supervisory and management functions, such as accounting, marketing, and personnel work.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Transport or arrange for transport of animals, equipment, food, animal feed, and other supplies to and from work sites.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect buildings, fences, fields or ranges, supplies, and equipment to determine work to be performed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read inventory records, customer orders, or shipping schedules to determine required activities.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Inspect facilities to determine maintenance needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Confer with managers to determine production requirements, conditions of equipment and supplies, and work schedules.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and maintain time or payroll reports, as well as details of personnel actions, such as performance evaluations, hires, promotions, or disciplinary actions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Requisition or purchase supplies, such as insecticides, machine parts or lubricants, or tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor or oversee construction projects, such as horticultural buildings or irrigation systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Issue equipment, such as farm implements, machinery, ladders, or containers to workers, and collect equipment when work is complete.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Calculate or monitor budgets for maintenance or development of collections, grounds, or infrastructure.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct or assist with the adjustment or repair of equipment or machinery.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor operations to identify and solve problems, improve work methods, and ensure compliance with safety, company, and government regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Plan work schedules according to personnel and equipment availability.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
